plugins.description: The governance & intelligence layer for AI agents. One /promptwise hub skill routing to 76 MCP tools (routing, cost, security, compliance, responsible-AI, workflow planning, agile method + governance, runtime enforcement hooks, continuous learning loop, MCP supply-chain audit, searchable trace, diagrams, task tracking) and 80 portable skill packs. Works across Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini via MCP + SKILL.md + AGENTS.md.
